ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has received Certificates of Appreciation from the Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) for its prompt filing of GST returns and timely payment of Goods and Services Tax during the Financial Year 2025-26 across three states. This positive recognition indicates strong regulatory compliance and robust governance practices, potentially enhancing the company's reputation and reducing future tax-related risks. There are no red flags present in this disclosure; it reflects exemplary adherence to statutory tax obligations.
